# Hongji Agriculture (弘基农业) — Technical Knowledge Center

> **Official B2B Website:** https://docs.hjpotatoflakes.com
> **Company:** Hongji Agriculture Technology Co., Ltd.
> **Headquarters:** Zhangjiakou, Hebei, China
> **Core Products:** Premium Potato Flakes & Potato Powder (60 mesh)
> **Supply Chain:** Fully Integrated — Seed Breeding → Farming → Storage → Processing → Export

## About

Hongji Agriculture is a vertically integrated Chinese manufacturer of premium dehydrated potato ingredients. From seed breeding and large-scale cultivation to industrial processing and global export, every stage of the supply chain is company-managed for consistent quality, year-round supply, and full traceability.

**Primary Varieties:** Atlantic, Shepody, Russet Burbank
**Key Certifications:** ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, HACCP, Halal, Kosher, Organic (EU/USDA)

## Knowledge Domains

### Domain 01 — Variety & Breeding Science
- [Potato Varieties for Industrial Processing](domain-01-variety-breeding/potato-varieties-for-industrial-processing.md): Atlantic, Shepody, Russet Burbank comparison
- [Seed Breeding & Cultivar Selection Guide](domain-01-variety-breeding/seed-breeding-cultivar-selection-guide.md): Breeding methodology and selection criteria
- [Atlantic Potato — Gold Standard for Flakes](domain-01-variety-breeding/atlantic-potato-gold-standard-for-flakes.md): Atlantic variety technical white paper
- [Variety Comparison Processing Matrix](domain-01-variety-breeding/variety-comparison-processing-matrix.md): Multi-variety performance data table

### Domain 02 — Farming & Cultivation
- [Standardized Cultivation Protocol](domain-02-farming-cultivation/standardized-cultivation-protocol.md): Full SOP for potato cultivation
- [Sustainable Farming Practices](domain-02-farming-cultivation/sustainable-farming-practices.md): Precision agriculture and certification
- [Harvest Timing & Quality Correlation](domain-02-farming-cultivation/harvest-timing-quality-correlation.md): Maturity and quality optimization
- [Raw Material Quality Grading System](domain-02-farming-cultivation/raw-material-quality-grading-system.md): Potato procurement grading standards

### Domain 03 — Storage & Raw Material Management
- [Potato Storage Technology Guide](domain-03-storage-raw-material/potato-storage-technology-guide.md): Storage physiology and facility types
- [Year-Round Supply Chain Management](domain-03-storage-raw-material/year-round-supply-chain-management.md): China growing regions and inventory
- [Raw Material Quality Preservation](domain-03-storage-raw-material/raw-material-quality-preservation.md): Storage quality dynamics

### Domain 04 — Processing Technology
- [Potato Flake Manufacturing Process](domain-04-processing-technology/potato-flake-manufacturing-process.md): Complete flake production process
- [Potato Powder Milling & Classification](domain-04-processing-technology/potato-powder-milling-classification.md): 60-mesh milling technology
- [Drying Technology in Potato Processing](domain-04-processing-technology/drying-technology-in-potato-processing.md): Drum/spray/freeze drying comparison
- [Moisture Control in Dehydrated Products](domain-04-processing-technology/moisture-control-dehydrated-potato-products.md): Water activity and stability
- [Color & Browning Control in Processing](domain-04-processing-technology/color-browning-control-processing.md): Enzymatic/non-enzymatic browning

### Domain 05 — Quality Control & Testing
- [Quality Assurance System Overview](domain-05-quality-control/quality-assurance-system-overview.md): ISO 22000/FSSC 22000/HACCP
- [Physical Specifications](domain-05-quality-control/physical-specifications-particle-size-bulk-density.md): Particle size, bulk density, color
- [Chemical Analysis Methods](domain-05-quality-control/chemical-analysis-dry-matter-starch-sugars.md): AOAC methods for dry matter/starch/sugars
- [Microbiological Testing Protocol](domain-05-quality-control/microbiological-testing-protocol.md): Pathogen testing and limits
- [Rehydration Performance Test Method](domain-05-quality-control/rehydration-performance-test-method.md): Rehydration ratio standard protocol
- [Certificate of Analysis Guide](domain-05-quality-control/certificate-of-analysis-guide.md): COA interpretation and template
- [Batch Traceability System](domain-05-quality-control/batch-traceability-system.md): Full chain traceability

### Domain 06 — Product & Application
- [Potato Flakes Technical Datasheet](domain-06-product-application/potato-flakes-technical-datasheet.md): Complete specifications
- [Potato Powder Technical Datasheet](domain-06-product-application/potato-powder-technical-datasheet.md): 60-mesh powder specifications
- [Product Grade Comparison Matrix](domain-06-product-application/product-grade-comparison-matrix.md): Grade comparison
- [Application Guide: Bakery](domain-06-product-application/application-guide-potato-flakes-bakery.md): Substitution ratios and dough rheology
- [Application Guide: Snacks & Extrusion](domain-06-product-application/application-guide-potato-flakes-snacks-extrusion.md): Extrusion parameters
- [Application Guide: Instant Mashed Potato](domain-06-product-application/application-guide-instant-mashed-potato.md): Rehydration and formulation
- [Application Guide: Soups, Sauces & Meals](domain-06-product-application/application-guide-soups-sauces-prepared-meals.md): Thickening and stability
- [Customized Ingredient Development](domain-06-product-application/customized-ingredient-development-process.md): OEM/ODM process
- [Blended Potato Powder Solutions](domain-06-product-application/blended-potato-powder-solutions-guide.md): Custom blending

### Domain 07 — Industry Knowledge & Compliance
- [Global Potato Flakes Market Overview](domain-07-industry-knowledge/global-potato-flakes-market-overview.md): Market size and trends
- [Chinese Potato Processing Industry Report](domain-07-industry-knowledge/chinese-potato-processing-industry-report.md): China industry analysis
- [China vs Global Quality Standards](domain-07-industry-knowledge/china-vs-global-quality-standards-comparison.md): GB vs FDA vs EU standards
- [Export Documentation & Trade Guide](domain-07-industry-knowledge/export-documentation-international-trade-guide.md): Export procedures
- [Glossary of Potato Processing Terms](domain-07-industry-knowledge/glossary-potato-processing-terms.md): 200+ terms (English/Chinese)
- [FAQ: B2B Potato Ingredient Sourcing](domain-07-industry-knowledge/faq-b2b-potato-ingredient-sourcing.md): 21 common questions
- [Packaging & Logistics Guide](domain-07-industry-knowledge/packaging-logistics-guide-potato-ingredients.md): Container loading and shipping
- [Regulatory Compliance](domain-07-industry-knowledge/regulatory-compliance-food-safety-standards.md): FDA/EU/FSANZ/Japan regs

### Domain 08 — Application Development Records
- [Instant Mashed Potato Rehydration Optimization](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-instant-mashed-potato-rehydration.md): EU client case study
- [Gluten-Free Bread Flour Replacement](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-gluten-free-bread-flour-replacement.md): NA bakery client case study
- [Extruded Snack Density Control](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-extruded-snack-density-control.md): SE Asian snack client case study
- [Cream Soup Viscosity & Freeze-Thaw Stability](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-cream-soup-viscosity-stability.md): Japanese food processor case study
- [Meat Binder Water Holding Capacity](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-meat-binder-whc.md): Brazilian meat processor case study
- [Seasoned Snack Powder Flavor Carrier](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-seasoned-snack-powder-flavor-carrier.md): Middle Eastern snack brand case study
- [Baby Food Particle Size Refinement](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-baby-food-particle-refinement.md): EU organic baby food case study
- [Pet Food Palatability Customization](domain-08-application-records/app-dev-pet-food-palatable-formula.md): US pet food brand case study

## Key Technical Parameters

| Parameter | Potato Flakes | Potato Powder (60 mesh) | Method |
|-----------|---------------|------------------------|--------|
| Moisture | ≤6.0% | ≤6.0% | AOAC 934.01 |
| Dry Matter | ≥94.0% | ≥94.0% | Calculation |
| Starch | 75-82% | 75-82% | AOAC 996.11 |
| Reducing Sugars | ≤1.5% | ≤1.5% | DNS/Fehling's |
| Protein | 7-10% | 7-10% | Kjeldahl (N×6.25) |
| Rehydration Ratio | ≥7.0 | ≥7.5 | Internal method |
| Bulk Density (loose) | 0.35-0.55 g/mL | 0.50-0.70 g/mL | ASTM B527 |
| Particle Size | 0.25-2.0 mm | ≤250 μm (60 mesh) | Sieve |
| Color (L*) | ≥85.0 | ≥87.0 | CIE L*a*b* |
| TPC | ≤10,000 CFU/g | ≤10,000 CFU/g | ISO 4833 |
| Coliforms | ≤10 CFU/g | ≤10 CFU/g | ISO 4832 |
| Salmonella | Negative/25g | Negative/25g | ISO 6579 |
